prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 2.4L *Dino F106A* V6 (2419cc, 195hp @ 7600rpm) with a fully balanced and blueprinted *F106B* block (from the 246 GT/4) bored to 2.6L (2592cc) using forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods. Pair with a custom billet crankshaft from *JE Pistons* and a *Weber 40 DCNF/6* carburetor setup with velocity stacks and a *K&N X-Stream* air filter for optimized airflow.

Exhaust: Install a *Capristo 3.5-inch stainless steel equal-length header* system with a *Supersprint 200-cell metallic catalytic converter* and a *Scorpion 3.5-inch titanium exhaust* featuring a *Valvetronic bypass valve* for adjustable backpressure, reducing weight by 12kg while retaining the Dino’s signature 6-cylinder scream.

Suspension & Handling: Replace the stock *Ferrari-designed double wishbone* setup with *Öhlins TTX40 coilovers* (custom valved for the 246’s 800kg front/700kg rear weight distribution) and *SuperPro poly bushings* for the front subframe. Add a *Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar* (22mm) and *Brembo GT 6-piston calipers* with *355mm two-piece floating rotors* (from the 360 Modena) for improved braking modulation.

Drivetrain: Upgrade the 5-speed transaxle with a *Quaife ATB differential* and a *Spec Stage 3+ clutch* with a *Tilton 7.25-inch flywheel* to handle the increased torque. Replace the stock half-shafts with *GKN Driveline CV joints* and *custom-length driveshafts* from *The Driveshaft Shop* to prevent driveline wind-up under hard acceleration.
estetica: Bodywork: Replace the original fiberglass panels with a *Zagato-style aluminum body kit* (hand-beaten by *Panelcraft UK*), including a *custom front splitter* with integrated *AIM MXS Strada* LED turn signals and a *rear diffuser* with *Vortex Generators* for improved high-speed stability. Paint in *Ferrari Rosso Dino* (custom mixed by *PPG*) with a *3M Matte Clear Coat* for a period-correct yet modern finish.

Wheels & Tires: Fit *OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT* 15x7 (front) and 15x8 (rear) wheels in *Gunmetal* with *Pirelli P7 Corsa Classic* tires (205/50R15 front, 225/50R15 rear) for authentic period grip. Use *H&R Trak+* spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the wheel arches and *BBS center-lock adapters* for a race-inspired look.

Interior: Retrim the cabin in *Conolly Vaumol leather* (matching the original *Tartan* pattern) with *Recaro SRD* seats (replica of the *Ferrari 250 GTO* seats) and a *MOMO Prototipo* steering wheel (380mm, suede). Install a *Motec C127* digital dash with *AEM X-Series* sensors and a *BorgWarner turbo timer* (hidden in the glovebox) for modern telemetry while retaining the original *Jaeger* analog gauges as a backup.
